root: ^NOUR: No way! Finally, some Sailor Moon merchandise with Uranus and Neptune! Oh, I love when they subvert gender roles. And when Uranus would wear a suit, man, I thought she looked so cool....

realvisited: ^NOUR: Yeah, that's more like it! Uranus and Neptune together. I love it when anime characters subvert gender roles. And when Uranus would wear a suit, man, I thought she looked so cool....
